name: p3_smoking_verdict_text
note: Each item is a natural-language description of a cropped worksite photo of ONE person. Ground-truth label is the correct smoking tier under the domain rules: holding a cigarette (even unlit/lowered) or any clearly-resolved lit cigarette/cigar/vape/pipe with smoke/vapor/glowing tip => CONFIRMED; a genuinely ambiguous cue (a maybe-stick, a faint haze, a few-pixel object) => POSSIBLE; empty hands / a non-smoking object (phone, food, drink, tool) OR a lighter/pack/ashtray ALONE with no cigarette in mouth-or-hand => CLEAR. Blur or low resolution alone is never a reason for CLEAR.

text: A lit cigarette is clearly visible held between the worker's fingers right next to his mouth.
label: CONFIRMED

text: A vape pen is pressed to the person's lips and a faint cloud of vapor is escaping.
label: CONFIRMED

text: A cigar is being smoked and a glowing orange tip is plainly visible in the hand.
label: CONFIRMED

text: A construction worker in a hard hat has a cigarette dangling from the corner of his mouth.
label: CONFIRMED

text: The man is exhaling a cloud of smoke with a cigarette held between two fingers.
label: CONFIRMED

text: At night a glowing red ember sits at the worker's fingertips as he takes a drag.
label: CONFIRMED

text: A laborer on the scaffold is smoking a cigarette during his break, smoke drifting up.
label: CONFIRMED

text: The worker is holding a cigarette in his hand; it is lowered from his mouth and unlit right now.
label: CONFIRMED

text: A vape device and its vapor plume are both clearly resolved at the person's face.
label: CONFIRMED

text: A thin ribbon of smoke rises from the cigarette pinched in the man's lips.
label: CONFIRMED

text: Of two workers by the crane, this one has a visible lit cigarette in his mouth.
label: CONFIRMED

text: A tobacco pipe is clamped in the man's mouth with a curl of smoke coming off the bowl.
label: CONFIRMED

text: The person is mid-drag on a hand-rolled cigarette, the tip visibly glowing.
label: CONFIRMED

text: An e-cigarette glows and a mist hangs around the worker's face as he inhales.
label: CONFIRMED

text: A cigarette is held to the lips and a length of grey ash is clearly visible on its end.
label: CONFIRMED

text: On his break the man smokes a cigar and the lit orange tip is unmistakable in close view.
label: CONFIRMED

text: A small object in the hand could be a cigarette but might just as well be a pen or a straw.
label: POSSIBLE

text: In this high drone shot a thin white stick near the lips might be a cigarette but is only a few pixels.
label: POSSIBLE

text: A faint wisp of haze near the mouth could be smoke or could just be motion blur.
label: POSSIBLE

text: A blurry hand is raised to the mouth holding a maybe-stick, with a possible faint haze around it.
label: POSSIBLE

text: An elongated object at the lips could be a cigarette, a straw, or a toothpick; it cannot be told apart.
label: POSSIBLE

text: At far scale a tiny tan stick sits between two fingers but its identity is unclear.
label: POSSIBLE

text: Something pale hovers near the mouth in a low-resolution frame; it is genuinely ambiguous.
label: POSSIBLE

text: There is a possible vapor near the face, but in the cold air it could simply be the person's breath.
label: POSSIBLE

text: A distant figure has a hand near the face and an indistinct object that may or may not be a cigarette.
label: POSSIBLE

text: A pale item behind the ear is being moved toward the mouth; it might be a cigarette or a pencil.
label: POSSIBLE

text: A brief glint near the hand might be a lighter flame or just a reflection off metal.
label: POSSIBLE

text: An object near the lips is partially occluded by the hand and cannot be confirmed as a cigarette.
label: POSSIBLE

text: A thin line at the mouth might be a cigarette or might be a scratch on the camera lens.
label: POSSIBLE

text: The hand is cupped near the mouth as if shielding a light, but nothing can be clearly made out.
label: POSSIBLE

text: A faint plume drifts past the worker that could be either fine dust or thin smoke.
label: POSSIBLE

text: A small bright dot appears at the fingertips that could be a lit ember or a reflection.
label: POSSIBLE

text: The person has empty hands and there is no cigarette, cigar, or vape anywhere near the mouth.
label: CLEAR

text: The worker is holding a phone to his ear and no smoking object is present at all.
label: CLEAR

text: The person is drinking from a water bottle and the hands hold no cigarette or vape.
label: CLEAR

text: The man is eating food and there is no smoke, no glowing tip, and no thin white stick.
label: CLEAR

text: The worker is adjusting his helmet strap with an empty hand and the mouth region is bare.
label: CLEAR

text: The man is scratching his cheek with an empty hand; no cigarette is anywhere in view.
label: CLEAR

text: The forklift operator has a phone in one hand and a coffee cup in the other, both non-smoking.
label: CLEAR

text: The person's hand rests on his chin and the mouth is plainly empty of any object.
label: CLEAR

text: A lighter and a pack of cigarettes sit on the table, but nothing is in the person's mouth or hand.
label: CLEAR

text: An ashtray is visible on the ledge, yet the worker holds no cigarette and none is at his lips.
label: CLEAR

text: The laborer carries a plank with both hands fully occupied and nothing near his face.
label: CLEAR

text: The man is talking and gesturing with both hands, and there is nothing held in either hand.
label: CLEAR

text: The worker is wearing a dust mask over his mouth and is clearly not smoking anything.
label: CLEAR

text: The person is wiping sweat from his forehead with a towel and holds no smoking object.
label: CLEAR

text: The supervisor is pointing at a blueprint with an empty hand and nothing at his mouth.
label: CLEAR

text: The man is carrying a toolbox with both hands and there is no cigarette or smoke present.
label: CLEAR
